name: ap-optimal-claude
description: Optimized Claude Code workflow kit: auto-updating hooks (session-context loading, self-review on stop, pre-commit status, pre-compact handoff), session startup + handoff system, project documentation skills, outcome-grading loops, spec/fix/prd workflows, and specialist agents (architect, code-verifier, mechanic). Pair with the claude-setup.py bootstrapper for permission guardrails and the ccx launcher.
